name: 12ct Holiday Wax Melt Fresh Fraser, Festive Spice & Cozy Cashmere - Threshold™
description:
Bring the cozy warmth of the holidays into your home with the 12ct Holiday Fresh Fraser, Festive Spice and Cozy Cashmere Wax Melt - Threshold™. Each wax melt blends festive spice and fresh Fraser pine with a hint of cozy cashmere, creating a perfect seasonal atmosphere. Whether you're hosting a holiday gathering or just enjoying a quiet evening, these wax melts will fill your space with a welcoming, comforting aroma.


Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
